title: Gold jumps 2% as oil slump eases inflation fears amid Trump Iran talks
summary_full: Gold climbed as declining oil prices helped temper worries over persistent inflation following reports that Washington is working on a proposal to bring an end to the Middle East conflict.
summary_public: Gold climbed as declining oil prices helped temper worries over persistent inflation following reports that Washington is working on a proposal to bring an end to the Middle East conflict.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: reports that Washington is working on a proposal to bring an end to the Middle East conflict.
